items.name: LEO_Sentinel
items.description: LEO Sentinel is a Python tool that aggregates every Low Earth Orbit satellite from open DB's. And classifies each object into one of roughly 40 mission categories (GNSS, military comms, commercial EO, CubeSat, debris, and so on) using pattern matching against satellite naming conventions.
